title: Design System: Job Page Draft Assistant

display.purpose: Settings section headings, overlay titles. One per major view.

headline.purpose: Card section sub-titles in settings. Group anchors.

title.purpose: Card headers and navigation labels in the dashboard.

body.purpose: Form content, descriptions, job description text.

label.purpose: Form field labels, settings field names. Not uppercase.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Light mode only. Separates surface-colored cards from the warm canvas. Invisible in dark mode.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Applied on :focus-visible. Accent-subtle tint, not a glow. Used on all interactive elements.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state changes. Exponential ease-out — starts fast, settles with authority.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Hover state micro-transitions. Background and color changes.

breakpoints.name: two-col
breakpoints.purpose: Dashboard switches from single-column to two-column layout.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for primary generate actions and terminal save actions. Slate Tide background, no gradient.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; background: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); color: var(--color-accent-on, #f8fdfe); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #236a79; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #fefdfb), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #2e7585); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions alongside the primary. Raised background, bordered.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; background: var(--color-raised, #f2efea); color: var(--color-ink-2, #686f7d); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #d6d9e4); border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover:not(:disabled) { background: var(--color-border-subtle, #eaecf0); color: var(--color-ink, #1d2330); border-color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #fefdfb), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-accent, #2e7585); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Confirm Button
components.description: Terminal actions: export, save. Confirmed Green background. Reserved for completion moments.
components.css: .ds-btn-confirm { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; background: var(--color-success, #2d8e5f); color: var(--color-accent-on, #f8fdfe); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-confirm:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #257350; } .ds-btn-confirm:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface, #fefdfb), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-success, #2d8e5f); } .ds-btn-confirm:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Form input for job info, profile fields, API keys. Raised background at rest, brightens on focus.
components.css: .ds-field-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-ink-2, #686f7d); line-height: 1.4; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--color-raised, #f2efea); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #d6d9e4); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--color-ink, #1d2330); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 8px 12px; outline: none; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input:focus { background: var(--color-surface, #fefdfb); border-color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--color-accent-subtle, #e0f2f4); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-ink-3, #97a0ad); }

components.name: Card Panel
components.description: Document-section containers for the dashboard and settings. Border-defined, minimal shadow in light mode.
components.html:
Job Info

Card body content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface, #fefdfb); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #d6d9e4); border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; gap: 6px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-ink, #1d2330); letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--color-ink-2, #686f7d); line-height: 1.6; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .ds-card { box-shadow: none; } }

components.name: Step Badge
components.description: Sequential step indicators in the dashboard left column. Numbered circles that anchor the guided flow.
components.css: .ds-step-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; background: var(--color-accent-subtle, #e0f2f4); border: 1.5px solid var(--color-accent, #2e7585); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Preview tabs switching between Resume, Cover Letter, and Merged views.
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: flex; gap: 2px; } .ds-tab-btn { background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: var(--color-ink-3, #97a0ad); cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 10px 6px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tab-btn:hover { color: var(--color-ink-2, #686f7d); } .ds-tab-btn--active { color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); border-bottom-color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); } .ds-tab-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent-subtle, #e0f2f4); }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Transient status messages. Pill-shaped, bottom-center. Ease-out-quart entry, no bounce.
components.css: .ds-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(12px); background: var(--color-surface, #fefdfb); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #d6d9e4); color: var(--color-ink, #1d2330); padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), visibility 0s 200ms; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10000; } .ds-toast--show { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-toast { transition: opacity 0ms; } }

components.name: Upload Area
components.description: Drag-and-drop file input for source resume and templates. Dashed border, tinted on hover.
components.css: .ds-upload-area { border: 2px dashed var(--color-border, #d6d9e4); border-radius: 10px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-upload-area:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent, #2e7585); background-color: var(--color-accent-subtle, #e0f2f4); } .ds-upload-input { display: none; } .ds-upload-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-ink-2, #686f7d); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview:
A skilled career coach who never raises their voice. Warm, unhurried, competent. The tool recedes so the work can breathe: the document being drafted is always the hero, the interface never is. This system trusts restraint. Every element earns its place by serving the user's task, not by decorating the screen.

The physical scene driving every decision: a job seeker at a desk, morning or evening, focused and slightly anxious, wanting to feel capable and ready. The interface should feel like the right tool for an important moment — composed, credible, professional without being corporate.

This system explicitly rejects: dark mode with purple or indigo gradients and glowing accents; corporate job-board coldness; colorful gamified resume builders; generic productivity-app softness.
keyCharacteristics: System-adaptive: follows OS light/dark preference with consistent tokens in both modes
Restrained color strategy: warm-buff or cool-dark neutrals with one deliberate slate-teal accent
Typographic contrast through weight and size — Plus Jakarta Sans for structure, Inter for content
Flat-first elevation: cards defined by border and tonal background, not shadow drama
Progressive confidence: the interface becomes more alive as the user's work progresses

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The accent appears only on interactive targets: buttons, links, focus rings, active states. Never decorative.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: Pure white (#ffffff) and pure black (#000000) are forbidden. Every neutral carries a micro-tint.

rules.name: The Tonal Rule
rules.body: In dark mode, shadows are invisible. Use background lightness steps to convey elevation hierarchy.

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: No text below 11.5px. Step badges at 10px are the documented exception and carry no critical information.

rules.name: The Weight Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is established through size and weight contrast, never color alone.

dos: Use OKLCH for all color values
Tint every neutral toward its brand hue — warm (85°) for backgrounds, cool (240–250°) for text and borders
Use Plus Jakarta Sans 600–700 for headings, Inter for body and form fields
Apply the accent color only to interactive targets
Use prefers-reduced-motion to disable or reduce all animations
Write export button copy with confidence — 'Save as PDF' not '⚠️ Quick PDF'
Keep the document preview as the visual hero
donts: Don't use dark mode with purple or indigo gradients, glow effects, or glassmorphism
Don't use corporate job-board / recruiter aesthetics
Don't use colorful gamified resume-builder patterns
Don't use transition: all — specify exact properties
Don't use bounce or spring easing
Don't apply border-left or border-top greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't use gradient fills on buttons or logo marks
Don't add glow-colored box-shadows to interactive elements
Don't place developer debug controls in the production user interface
Don't use warning icons on primary action buttons
